items.title: Bizarre play as Peterson refused to give his tenth foul and they let Wizards run clock out instead. Wizards win 92-88. Dybantsa with 27 points, Tre Johnson with 26, Darryn Peterson with 24.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Bizarre play as Peterson refused to give his tenth foul and they let Wizards run clock out instead. Wizards win 92-88. Dybantsa with 27 points, Tre Johnson with 26, Darryn Peterson with 24.

items.title: When the Wizards open their summer-league schedule Thursday, several players will receive reps handling the basketball as a developmental opportunity: (in alphabetical order) AJ Dybantsa, Tre Johnson and Will Riley.
items.author: Josh Robbins
items.body_excerpt: When the Wizards open their summer-league schedule Thursday, several players will receive reps handling the basketball as a developmental opportunity: (in alphabetical order) AJ Dybantsa, Tre Johnson and Will Riley.

items.title: Wizards' Tre Johnson: New competition added
items.author: CBS Sports
